# Line Search

**Summary**: A strategy to find an optimal step length along a chosen search direction during optimization.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-zhang|Zhang, 2015]] used line search (LSCH) in conjunction with LM to determine the step size for each iteration.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- LM+DE and LM+DE+LSCH showed identical results, proving that DE can replace LSCH when an optimal damping factor is found. ([[2015-zhang|Zhang, 2015, p. 73]])
